since_last: 12% of 84 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +0.16%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 12% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.45% · BTC -1.98% · Gold -1.52% · Nasdaq100 -1.77%. 12% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +0.16%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +0.16%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.67%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +8.62%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +8.62%, AVAV +7.36%, BIDU +5.19%, CHKP +1.31%, SPCX +1.29%. Laggards: MGNI -4.14%, RXRX -3.65%, NOW -3.36%, MU -2.91%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.29% at $151.4
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.29% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
